title: spiraea betulifolia subsp. aemiliana
intro: Spiraea betulifolia subsp. aemiliana, also known as Maybush, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family, native to Europe. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been attributed to its flavonoid and phenolic content. The health benefits of Spiraea betulifolia subsp. aemiliana include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide antioxidant protection. In herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and may also be used in combination with other herbs to create medicinal preparations.
